texto: Today's youth cannot escape the shadow of racism that has been passed down organically from parents and others who cling to a distorted image of American history, one informed by, and articulated from, a worldview permeated by white privilege. [sic], these biases are so hardwired that most of us have no idea how quickly and automatically they kick in and how enduring they can be.
explicacao: Citação de Thomas Norman DeWolf sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Today's youth cannot escape the shadow of racism that has been passed down organically from paren…” articula tempo, racism, white-privilege em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como termino e white-privilege.

[sic], these biases are so hardwired that most of us have no idea how quickly and automatically they kick in and how enduring they can be.

texto: We all inherit damage from the past. We spread it like a virus and don't generally think about it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Thomas Norman DeWolf: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “We all inherit damage from the past. We spread it like a virus and don't generally think about it.” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, history, racism pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de racism.
